title: Greeny's FPS ModPack
description:
The Best FPS Modpack made by itzgreenwolf_yt...

Aims to provide a greater maximum performance/FPS  in everyday minecraft.

Giving you the best fps u can ever get
High end pcs getting 600+ fps
Mid pcs 300+
Low End 15-200+
body:
I made this modpack with greatest fps u will ever get
some computers may still lag
if u have a good pc you get more then 450-500+ fps

i recommend adding 4 to 8 gb of ram

....................................................................................................................................................................................................................

Giving you the best fps u can ever get
- High end pcs getting 600+ fps
- Mid pcs 300+
- Low End 15-200+
..........................................................................................................................................................................................................
Reason behind the modpack i wanted to make a modpack that gives more then great fps rather then use some elses modpack that may be shady so i made mine own, gave it to some friends to test it out and it works! so hopyfully everyone gets better fps
if my modpack doesn't fit you i recommend Fabulously Optimized modpack works awesome.


_**i will be adding more versions to come for both forge and fabic **_
